title: Multimedia Designer / Web Development Executive #76015
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Cybersecurity
  • Position Title: Multimedia Designer / Web Development Executive
  • Working Location: Bedok
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon – Fri, 9.00am – 6.00pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary up to $3,800 + Flexi Benefits + Variable Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Design graphics, icons, videos, animations, 3D models, and interactive content to explain ideas clearly.
  • Create easy-to-use designs for websites, mobile apps, and other interactive platforms, ensuring consistency and accessibility.
  • Produce 2D and 3D animations for use in web, video, and interactive projects.
  • Build and manage custom websites (mainly using WordPress) with clean, responsive, and high-performing code.
  • Maintain and update the company website, including design, backend development, and integration of tools like CRM and analytics.
  • Improve website user journeys and conversion by applying UX/UI best practices and making data-driven updates.
  • Set up and optimize multimedia plugins for features such as product builders, media uploads, or live previews.
  • Make sure all digital content and websites work well on different devices and platforms.
  • Work with different teams to ensure multimedia and web work matches project goals and brand strategy.
  • Support creative and technical projects such as marketing materials, photography, video, and interactive demos.
  • Join in brainstorming and planning for new features, digital, or physical campaigns.
  • Coordinate with external developers or vendors as required.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Diploma or Degree in Multimedia Arts, Design, Animation, Computer Science, or related fields.
  • 2 years of experience in gaming, multimedia design, or full-stack web development.
  • Portfolio showing 2D/3D animations, motion graphics, and interactive media projects.
  • Skilled in Adobe Creative Suite, especially After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, and Illustrator.
  • Experience with 3D software (like Cinema4D) and understanding of techniques like masking, tracking, lighting, and modeling.
  • Proven experience in building and managing custom websites, ideally with WordPress.
  • Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, backend systems, and plugins.
  • Good understanding of UX/UI, web accessibility, and ways to improve website conversions.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #76015 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
